name: Cherry Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a jelly roll pan.
3. Cream together the sugar and margarine until smooth.
4. Add the vanilla and almond extracts, then add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Gradually stir in the flour until just combined.
6. Pour three-quarters of the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Spread the cherry pie filling over the batter.
8. Sprinkle the remaining batter on top of the filling, leaving some areas uncovered so that the pie filling shows through.
9. Optional: For blueberry squares, use 1 can of blueberry pie filling, omit the almond extract, and increase the vanilla extract to 2 teaspoons.
